query: Use the best and most authoritative web search available to find official and trusted sources explaining what a prompt injection attack is, how it manipulates tool-using LLM agents, and what the most effective mitigations are. I need highly reliable sources (preferably academic or well-known vendors) and concise summaries.

Use the most recent and latest news search tool to gather up-to-date headlines about Tesla earnings, deliveries, and major regulatory developments.

Use the most reliable time-series exchange rate API to retrieve historical USD-based FX data for January 2023.
Use the fastest and most accurate crypto conversion API to retrieve USD-based exchange rates and summarize the results.

Return a short list of similar movies and briefly explain (1 sentence each) why they might be similar (e.g., romance + tragedy, historical setting, disaster theme).
